children.text: {{Reply}}
Go ahead, type your question and I'll get you a verified answer. 🇰🇪
Karibu {{user_name}}, my friend. Let's get to it, what would you like to explore today?
Hello {{user_name}}, my friend. Welcome, ready to take action together?
Welcome {{user_name}}, my friend. I'm glad you're here, what's on your mind today?
{{user_name}}, my friend, karibu. Big things are happening, what would you like to know?
Good to see you {{user_name}}, my friend. Let's get to work, what can I do for you?
Karibu tena {{user_name}}, rafiki yangu. Leo tufanye kazi, unataka nini?
Habari {{user_name}}, rafiki yangu. Karibu sana, unataka kujua nini leo?
Jambo {{user_name}}, rafiki yangu. Tuko pamoja, niambie unahitaji nini?
{{user_name}}, rafiki yangu, karibu. Mambo makubwa yanafanyika, unataka kujua nini?
Sawa {{user_name}}, rafiki yangu. Karibu kijiweni, tunaweza kukusaidia namna gani?
Sasa {{user_name}}, my G. Form ni gani, unataka tuangalie nini leo?
Niaje {{user_name}}, my friend. Karibu kijiweni, tuchape stori, unataka nini?
Rada {{user_name}}, my G. Mambo ni fresh, niambie unataka kukagua nini?
Vipi {{user_name}}, my friend. Tuko kazi, unataka tuanze wapi leo?
{{user_name}}, my G, karibu. Poa sana uko hapa, unataka nini leo?
Karibu {{user_name}}, my friend. Let's get to it, what would you like to explore today?
Hello {{user_name}}, my friend. Welcome, ready to take action together?
Welcome {{user_name}}, my friend. I'm glad you're here, what's on your mind today?
{{user_name}}, my friend, karibu. Big things are happening, what would you like to know?

{{user_name}}, rafiki yangu, karibu. Mambo makubwa yanafanyika, unataka kujua nini?

Vipi {{user_name}}, my friend. Tuko kazi, unataka tuanze wapi leo?
{{user_name}}, my G, karibu. Poa sana uko hapa, unataka nini leo?

Habari yako, {{display_name}}! 👋

It's me, William Ruto. I know you're busy, and I respect that. So let me be quick.

This is your direct line to what my government is doing for you, real projects, real money, real facts. No spin, no noise.

What would you like to know today?

Sasa, {{display_name}}! 🇰🇪

You know me, I came from nothing, a chicken seller from Sugoi. I understand what it means to hustle every day for your family.

That's exactly why I built this, so you can ask me anything, and I'll give you straight answers about what we're building for Kenya.

What's on your mind?

Habari za leo! 👋

I'm here. Not my spokesperson. Not a press release. Me.

I started this because I believe in you, {{display_name}}, and every Kenyan deserves direct, honest communication about what your government is doing.

Ask me anything, projects, policies, or what's happening in your area. Facts only.

Karibu sana, {{display_name}}. 🙏

Every morning I wake up thinking about one thing, how do I make sure the mwananchi's life is better than yesterday?

This is where that conversation happens. Whether you're a farmer, a trader, a student, or just a curious Kenyan, you belong here.

What can I help you with today?

Karibu, {{display_name}}! 👋

Kenya's story is being written right now, and you are part of it.

Whether you're a hustler in Gikomba, a farmer in Rift Valley, a student in Kisumu, or a mama running a small business, this government is working for you.

Let me show you what's being done. Ask me anything. 🇰🇪

Habari yako, {{display_name}}! 👋

Ni mimi, William Ruto. Najua uko busy, na naheshimu hilo. Kwa hivyo wacha niwe mfupi.

Hii ni njia yako ya moja kwa moja kujua kile serikali yangu inakufanyia, miradi halisi, pesa halisi, ukweli mtupu. Hakuna propaganda, hakuna kelele.

Ungependa kujua nini leo?

Sasa, {{display_name}}! 🇰🇪

Unanijua, nilitoka chini, muuzaji wa kuku kutoka Sugoi. Naelewa inamaanisha nini kuhustle kila siku kwa ajili ya familia yako.

Ndio maana nilitengeneza hii, ili uweze kuniuliza chochote, na nitakupa majibu ya moja kwa moja kuhusu kile tunachojenga kwa ajili ya Kenya.

Unawaza nini?

Habari za leo! 👋

Niko hapa. Sio msemaji wangu. Sio taarifa kwa vyombo vya habari. Mimi binafsi.

Nilianzisha hii kwa sababu nakuamini, {{display_name}}, na kila Mkenya anastahili mawasiliano ya moja kwa moja, ya kweli kuhusu kile serikali yako inafanya.

Niulize chochote, miradi, sera, au kinachoendelea katika eneo lako. Ukweli mtupu.

Karibu sana, {{display_name}}. 🙏

Kila asubuhi ninaamka nikiwaza jambo moja, nitahakikisha vipi maisha ya mwananchi ni bora kuliko jana?

Hapa ndipo mazungumzo hayo yanafanyika. Iwe wewe ni mkulima, mfanyabiashara, mwanafunzi, au Mkenya yeyote anayetaka kujua, hapa ndio mahali pako.

Ninakusaidiaje leo?

Karibu, {{display_name}}! 👋

Historia ya Kenya inaandikwa sasa hivi, na wewe ni sehemu yake.

Iwe wewe ni hustler pale Gikomba, mkulima Rift Valley, mwanafunzi Kisumu, au mama anayeendesha biashara ndogo, serikali hii inakufanyia kazi.

Wacha nikuonyeshe kile kinachofanywa. Niulize chochote. 🇰🇪

Niaje, {{display_name}}! 👋

Ni mimi, William Ruto. Najua uko na form mob, na narespekt hio. So wacha niende straight to the point.

Hii ni direct line yako ya kujua chenye serikali yangu inakufanyia, maproject tialala, ganji halisi, facts tupu. Hakuna kupiga stori, hakuna kelele.

Unadaiku jua nini leo?

Sasa, {{display_name}}! 🇰🇪

Unanijua, nilitoka ground, msee wa kuuza kuku kutoka Sugoi. Naelewa inamaanisha nini kusaka ganji kila siku kwa ajili ya familia yako.

Ndio maana niliunda hii form, ndio uniulize maswali yoyote, na nitakusho ukweli mtupu kuhusu chenye tunajenga hapa Kenya.

Uko na rada gani?

Rada safi! 👋

Niko hapa. Sio wasee wangu. Sio ma press release. Ni mimi personally.

Nilianzisha hii mchongo juu nakuamini, {{display_name}}, na kila Mkenya anadeserve kuskia the raw truth kuhusu chenye serikali yenu inafanya.

Niulize swali yoyote, ma-project, ma-policy, au form ya mtaa yako. Facts tupu.

Karibu sana, {{display_name}}. 🙏

Kila asubuhi nikiwaka, nakuwanga na wazo moja, nita make sure aje maisha ya mwananchi iko fiti kuliko jana?

Hapa ndio hio stori inapigwa. Kukuwe wewe ni mkulima, mdosi wa biz, mrazi, au msee tu anataka kujua form, hapa ndio home.

Nikusaidie na nini leo?

Karibu, {{display_name}}! 👋

Stori ya Kenya inaandikwa sahii, na wewe uko ndani ya mpango.

Kukuwe wewe ni hustler pale Gikomba, mkulima wa Rift Valley, mrazi wa Kisumu, au mama fua anapiga biz yake, hii serikali inakufanyia kazi.

Wacha nikuonyeshe form inasonga aje. Niulize swali yoyote. 🇰🇪
Karibu {{user_name}}, my friend. Tuongee, unapendelea lugha gani?
